description: ADK interconnect-axis rule parameter defaults. Consumed by the KLayout deck (klayout/drc/rule_decks/8_2_interconnect.drc) when an interconnect adapter is loaded. Interconnect adapters override individual values via Ruby (interconnect_rules['IXN_pitch'] = X). Defaults match the IHP cu-pillar default option (Table 6.1 Option 1: 35 um opening, 40 um space, 75 um pitch), mirroring the interposer stage's interposer_tech_default.json so both stages of the dual-stage DRC check the same numbers. The interconnect axis is optional: with no interconnect adapter, this registry is unused and behaviour is identical to v0.1.0.

rule_descriptions.IXN_spacing: Minimum edge-to-edge spacing between chiplet attachment points, in micrometres.
rule_descriptions.IXN_pitch: Minimum centre-to-centre pitch between attachment points, in micrometres. Checked as a spacing of (pitch - pad_size) since KLayout has no native pitch check.
rule_descriptions.IXN_pad_size: Representative attachment-pad size in micrometres, used for the pitch-to-spacing conversion.
